<!--
Thanks for contributing! Make sure your PR title follows Conventional Commits:
  feat(react): add useT hook
  fix(cli): handle missing config file gracefully
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adding/updating tests
- [ ] build/ci — build system or CI changes
- [ ] chore — other

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Types are sound (`pnpm typecheck` passes)
- [ ] Lint is clean (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) — required for any user-visible change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
